return(function(q,n,p,O,k,y,u,e,M,c,f,l,F,g,h,D,H,K,B,R,C)H,D,l,c,e,M,K,B,g,F,C,R,f,h=function(q,I)local n=D(I)local p=function(...)return F(q,{...},I,n)end return p end,function(q)for
